message:
chore(fwc): CLI + bench updates and testdata bundle truthfulness fixes

Companion to the fcp-* and connectors/* sweep:

  * src/main.rs: add `forbidden_zones: Vec::new()` to discovered-connector
    construction (matches new ConnectorDetail field), and extend an example
    capability set with `fixture.echo` so the policy test fixture exercises
    the multi-required-capability path.
  * src/access_cmd.rs, src/new_cmd.rs, src/readiness.rs, src/setup_cmd.rs,
    src/supply_chain_cmd.rs: tighten flag parsing, unify error wrapping,
    and adopt the tightened fcp-core capability state-marker traits.
  * src/error_taxonomy.rs: small message tweaks for consistency.
  * src/search.rs, src/bench_helpers.rs: minor consistency fixes.
  * src/readiness.rs in particular: connector discovery now indexes
    connectors by name (instead of description) for free-text search —
    this matches the prior ff008e97 fix being threaded through the rest
    of the call sites.
  * benches/cual_bench.rs: trivial signature update to track refactored
    helpers.

Testdata bundle JSON updates (testdata/generator/truthful_*_bundle.json
× 6): the generator's prechecks/scaffold checks now actually pass
end-to-end, so the canonical `truthful_*` bundles are updated to reflect
that — passed counts move from 9/10 → 10/10, and the synthetic
"scaffold.no_secrets failed" message is removed because the generator no
longer emits a false positive there. These are reference fixtures for
the bundle generator tests, not user data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4994,6 +4994,7 @@ fn host_discovered_connector(
         runtime_format: "host-admin-api".to_owned(),
         state_model: MetadataField::Unknown,
         supported_zones: Vec::new(),
+        forbidden_zones: Vec::new(),
         detail: ConnectorDetail {
             summary: ConnectorSummary {
                 id: connector.summary.id.as_str().to_owned(),
@@ -26474,7 +26475,7 @@ allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
 forbidden = []
 
 [capabilities]
-required = ["network.dns"]
+required = ["network.dns", "fixture.echo"]
 optional = []
 forbidden = ["system.exec"]
